title: Assertion failure while elaborating generate loop
body:
iverilog appears to have trouble with constant function calls in certain contexts of generate constructs.

For example, on https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/blob/master/tests/various/const_func.v, I get:
```
Assertion failed: (test), function generate_scope_loop_, file elab_scope.cc, line 1172.
sh: line 1: 24775 Done                    /usr/local/Cellar/icarus-verilog/10.3/lib/ivl/ivlpp -L -F"/var/folders/15/qlmr890j0gq81stdzpt3t6xw0000gn/T//ivrlg218d12583" -f"/var/folders/15/qlmr890j0gq81stdzpt3t6xw0000gn/T//ivrlg18d12583" -p"/var/folders/15/qlmr890j0gq81stdzpt3t6xw0000gn/T//ivrli18d12583"
     24776 Abort trap: 6           | /usr/local/Cellar/icarus-verilog/10.3/lib/ivl/ivl -C"/var/folders/15/qlmr890j0gq81stdzpt3t6xw0000gn/T//ivrlh18d12583" -C"/usr/local/Cellar/icarus-verilog/10.3/lib/ivl/vvp.conf" -- -
```

I am using `Icarus Verilog version 10.3 (stable) (v10_3)`. If it would be helpful, I can produce other examples as well.
code_blocks:
Assertion failed: (test), function generate_scope_loop_, file elab_scope.cc, line 1172.
sh: line 1: 24775 Done                    /usr/local/Cellar/icarus-verilog/10.3/lib/ivl/ivlpp -L -F"/var/folders/15/qlmr890j0gq81stdzpt3t6xw0000gn/T//ivrlg218d12583" -f"/var/folders/15/qlmr890j0gq81stdzpt3t6xw0000gn/T//ivrlg18d12583" -p"/var/folders/15/qlmr890j0gq81stdzpt3t6xw0000gn/T//ivrli18d12583"
     24776 Abort trap: 6           | /usr/local/Cellar/icarus-verilog/10.3/lib/ivl/ivl -C"/var/folders/15/qlmr890j0gq81stdzpt3t6xw0000gn/T//ivrlh18d12583" -C"/usr/local/Cellar/icarus-verilog/10.3/lib/ivl/vvp.conf" -- -
